stemHtml:
If you want to depart with maximum allowable take off fuel, determine the amount of extra fuel can you refuel, given:

Dry operating mass: 45 000 kg
Maximum structural take-off mass: 143 000 kg
Maximum performace limited take-off mass: 140 000 kg
Maximum zero fuel mass: 92 000 kg
Maximum structural landing mass: 95 000 kg
Trip fuel: 12 600 kg
Taxi fuel: 120 kg
Contingency fuel: 1400 kg
Alternate fuel: 3100 kg
Final reserve fuel: 3000 kg
Captains fuel: 3300 kg
Traffic load: 16 000 kg
